name: DigitalBridge Group, Inc.
business: DigitalBridge Group, Inc. is a global investment manager in digital infrastructure, deploying and managing capital across data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks. Its diverse global investor base includes public and private pensions, sovereign wealth funds, other asset managers, insurance companies, and endowments. At December 31, 2025, it had $41.0 billion of fee earning equity under management and 316 employees.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading global investment manager in digital infrastructure, deploying and managing capital across the digital ecosystem, including data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks.
We are a leading global investment manager in digital infrastructure, deploying and managing capital across the digital ecosystem, including data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks.

We invest in digital infrastructure assets in which we believe we have a competitive advantage with our experience and track record of value creation in this sector, and which possess a durable cash flow profile with compelling secular growth characteristics driven by key themes such as artificial intelligence, 5G and cloud-adoption.

Established operators, investors and thought leaders with over two decades of experience in investing and operating across the full spectrum of digital infrastructure, including towers, data centers, fiber, small cells, and edge infrastructure.

The occurrence of a cybersecurity incident or a failure to implement effective information and cybersecurity policies, procedures and capabilities has the potential to disrupt our operations, cause material harm to our financial condition, result in misappropriation of assets, compromise confidential information and/or damage our business relationships.

catalysts.sentence: Subject to conditions set forth in the Merger Agreement, the Merger is expected to be completed in the second half of 2026.
